surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal change: two NEW reviewer subagent prompts (spec-reviewer, doubt-reviewer) + build Step-6 orchestration docs + a drift-protection meta-test, across shipwright-build and shipwright-iterate plugins. No startable web/CLI/API app surface is affected. Verification is the touched plugins' full pytest suites (build 84, iterate 258) + integration (136) + anti-ratchet (clean) + the sub-iterate-runner contract (37). Behavioral acceptance (live probe-build where spec-reviewer rejects spec-divergent code; doubt-reviewer fires on migrations but not docs-only) is prompt-execution, covered structurally by test_reviewer_orchestration.py.
